user.title: Solar Forecast STATS - Setup
user.description:
Configure your country and main sensors.

Solar power comes automatically from SFML.

data_description.country: Select your country for VAT and electricity price defaults.
data_description.sensor_home_consumption: Unit: Watt. Total current power consumption of the entire household. (Required)
data_description.sensor_home_consumption_daily: Unit: kWh. Total household consumption since midnight. (Optional: will be integrated from W-sensor if omitted)
data_description.sensor_solar_to_house: Unit: Watt. Portion of solar power flowing directly to the house. (Optional: will be calculated if omitted)

optional.title: Optional Sensors
optional.description: Configure battery and grid sensors. You can skip this step if not needed.

data_description.sensor_battery_soc: Unit: Percent (0-100). Current state of charge. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_battery_power: Unit: Watt. Positive = charging, Negative = discharging. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_import_daily: Unit: kWh. Grid import since midnight. Must reset at 0:00. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_export_daily: Unit: kWh. Grid export since midnight. Must reset at 0:00. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_import_extra: Additional grid consumption not captured by smartmeter (e.g. battery charging from grid). Daily kWh sensor. (Optional)

data_description.billing_price_mode: Dynamic: hourly prices from GPM. Fixed: single price. None: disables financial displays.

pricing_fixed.title: Fixed Tariff
pricing_fixed.description: Enter work price and grid fees separately — the total cost is their sum.

data_description.billing_work_price: Pure energy work price per kWh (without grid fees).
data_description.billing_grid_fees: Grid fees, metering, concession and taxes per kWh.
data_description.billing_base_fee: Monthly base fee in EUR (optional, 0 = none).
data_description.feed_in_tariff: Feed-in tariff in cents per kWh.

pricing_dynamic.title: Dynamic Tariff
pricing_dynamic.description: GPM (Grid Price Monitor) provides hourly market prices. Please enter your base fee, taxes, fees and markups.

data_description.billing_base_fee: Monthly base fee in EUR (optional, 0 = none).
data_description.feed_in_tariff: Feed-in tariff in cents per kWh.
data_description.vat_rate: Value Added Tax rate in percent (e.g. 19 for DE, 20 for AT).
data_description.gpm_grid_fee: Grid fees and metering fees per kWh (gross).
data_description.taxes_fees: Concession fees, electricity tax and other levies per kWh (gross).

abort.single_instance_allowed: Solar Forecast STATS is already configured.

sensors.title: All Sensors
sensors.description:
Configure all sensor mappings.

**W sensors** power the real-time energy flow diagram.
**kWh sensors** improve daily statistics accuracy.

data_description.country: Select country for VAT and price defaults.
data_description.sensor_home_consumption: Current household power consumption in Watt. (Required)
data_description.sensor_home_consumption_daily: Total household consumption today in kWh since midnight. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_solar_to_house: Direct solar power flow to household in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity for forecast chart overlays. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_battery_soc: Battery State of Charge in percent (0-100). (Optional)
data_description.sensor_battery_power: Battery charge/discharge power in Watt. Positive = charge, Negative = discharge. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_solar_to_battery: Solar power flowing into battery in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_battery_to_house: Power flowing from battery to house in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_battery_charge_solar_daily: Total solar energy charged into battery today in kWh. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_battery_charge_grid_daily: Total grid energy charged into battery today in kWh. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_battery_discharge_daily: Total energy discharged from battery today in kWh. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_to_house: Power flowing directly from grid to house in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_to_battery: Power flowing directly from grid to battery in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_house_to_grid: Total solar power fed into the grid in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_smartmeter_import: Smartmeter current import power in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_smartmeter_export: Smartmeter current export power in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_smartmeter_import_kwh: Cumulative smartmeter grid import reading in kWh (does not reset). (Optional)
data_description.sensor_smartmeter_export_kwh: Cumulative smartmeter grid export reading in kWh (does not reset). (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_import_daily: Total grid import today in kWh since midnight. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_export_daily: Total grid export today in kWh since midnight. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_grid_import_extra: Additional grid import not measured by smartmeter in kWh. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_price_total: Sensor providing current total electricity price in ct/kWh (e.g. from Tibber). (Optional)
data_description.sensor_heatpump_power: Current heat pump electrical power input in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_heatpump_daily: Heat pump daily electrical consumption in kWh. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_heatingrod_power: Current heating rod electrical power input in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_heatingrod_daily: Heating rod daily electrical consumption in kWh. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_wallbox_power: Current wallbox charging power in Watt. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_wallbox_daily: Wallbox daily charging energy in kWh. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_wallbox_state: Wallbox status sensor (e.g. charging, connected, idle). (Optional)

data_description.billing_price_mode: Dynamic: hourly prices from GPM. Fixed: single price. None: disables financial displays.

pricing_fixed.title: Fixed Tariff
pricing_fixed.description: Enter work price and grid fees separately — the total cost is their sum.

data_description.billing_work_price: Pure energy work price per kWh (without grid fees).
data_description.billing_grid_fees: Grid fees, metering, concession and taxes per kWh.
data_description.billing_base_fee: Monthly base fee in EUR (optional, 0 = none).
data_description.feed_in_tariff: Feed-in tariff in cents per kWh.

pricing_dynamic.title: Dynamic Tariff
pricing_dynamic.description: GPM (Grid Price Monitor) provides hourly market prices. Please enter your base fee, taxes, fees and markups.

data_description.billing_base_fee: Monthly base fee in EUR (optional, 0 = none).
data_description.feed_in_tariff: Feed-in tariff in cents per kWh.
data_description.vat_rate: Value Added Tax rate in percent (e.g. 19 for DE, 20 for AT).
data_description.gpm_grid_fee: Grid fees and metering fees per kWh (gross).
data_description.taxes_fees: Concession fees, electricity tax and other levies per kWh (gross).

advanced.title: Advanced Options
advanced.description: Smart charging, reports, panels, and forecast comparison.

data_description.smart_charging_enabled: Enable smart battery charging based on electricity prices.
data_description.generate_weekly: Create a weekly report every Sunday.
data_description.generate_monthly: Create a monthly report on the 1st of each month.
data_description.billing_start_month: Month when your billing year starts.
data_description.billing_start_day: Day when your billing year starts.
data_description.show_panel_groups: Display individual solar panel group charts and details on the Home page.
data_description.sensor_panel1_power: Unit: Watt. Current power of PV string 1. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_panel2_power: Unit: Watt. Current power of PV string 2. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_panel3_power: Unit: Watt. Current power of PV string 3. (Optional)
data_description.sensor_panel4_power: Unit: Watt. Current power of PV string 4. (Optional)
data_description.panel_group_names_input: Rename panel groups. Format: Old=New, Old2=New2
data_description.forecast_entity_1: Sensor with daily yield forecast in kWh (e.g. sensor.solcast_forecast_today). (Optional)
data_description.forecast_entity_2: Sensor with daily yield forecast in kWh. (Optional)

smart_charging.title: Smart Charging
smart_charging.description: Automatic battery charging from grid during cheap hours, respecting solar forecast and average daily consumption. Target SOC is calculated dynamically to leave enough room for tomorrow's solar surplus, clamped to min/max.

data_description.smart_charging_enabled: Master toggle. When off, no charging logic runs.
data_description.battery_capacity: Usable battery capacity. Used to translate solar kWh forecast into SOC percent.
data_description.min_soc: Target SOC will never fall below this value.
data_description.max_soc: Target SOC will never exceed this value. Typical: 95-100.
data_description.max_price: Current price below this threshold is considered cheap. Only then grid charging is allowed.
data_description.force_charge_price: Current price below this threshold triggers forced grid charging to max_soc during solar deficits (daytime) or at night.
data_description.battery_soc_sensor: Battery State-of-Charge sensor (0-100%). Without it, logic falls back to price-only mode.
data_description.smart_charging_switch: Switch entity to turn grid charging on/off in Home Assistant.
data_description.sensor_price_total: Monetary sensor providing current dynamic price (e.g. from Tibber).

consumers.title: Consumer Detail Sensors
consumers.description: Configure additional sensors for heat pump, heating rod and wallbox detail views. All fields are optional.

data.sensor_hp_heating_mode: Heat Pump: Heating Mode (select entity, e.g. off/auto/eco/comfort)
data.sensor_hp_dhw_mode: Heat Pump: Hot Water Mode (select entity, e.g. off/auto/eco)
data.sensor_hp_dhw_charging: Heat Pump: Hot Water Charging Active (binary sensor)
data.sensor_hp_pv_active: Heat Pump: PV Mode Active (binary sensor)
data.sensor_hp_electric_power: Heat Pump: Electrical Power Input (W or kW)
data.sensor_hp_thermal_power: Heat Pump: Thermal Power Output (W or kW)
data.sensor_hp_grid_daily: Heat Pump: Grid Energy Today (kWh, daily cumulative)
data.sensor_hp_pv_daily: Heat Pump: PV Energy Today (kWh, daily cumulative)
data.sensor_hp_storage_temp: Heat Pump: Hot Water Storage Temperature (°C)
